_comment: Reference recipe for the orca 'heartbeat' Automation. Codex has no event triggers, so this poll surfaces BLOCKED/COMPLETED. Recreate in Automations -> New. Guidance: $orca app-setup.
name: orca heartbeat
prompt: Read .orca/workflows/current/status.json. If status is BLOCKED or COMPLETED, summarize it in Triage and run: bash .orca/scripts/notify.sh '<status>: <task>'. Otherwise do nothing.
